persons.arguments_against: All five Fiji stints are one man: the highly distinctive full name J. L. V. Sukuna (the 'Ratu' prefix is his Fijian chiefly title), and the career maps the entry exactly — clerk (1912) -> cadet (1917) -> chief assistant, Native Lands Commission (1922) -> district commissioner (1932) -> administrative officer. No other person bears this name.
persons.would_overturn: A second same-surname person serving the same colony in the same years and offices, or a printed birth/death date excluding these years.

notes: production high-value slice batch 2, hand-adjudicated (Claude Code, in-session)
